Supervisor call
Only allowed when in "privileged mode"

Dump debug output
`spec` encodes what is to be output; assembler
includes builtin functions for generating spec field.
Print the given entry from the debug string table. R1, R2 are optional values for inclusion via format strings. If unused, assembler sets them to 0x3F.

Reg[Rd] = Imm
Intended for loading a literal address in to a register
Reg[Rd1] = Reg[R1] / Reg[R2], Reg[Rd2] = Reg[R1] % Reg[R2]
Reg[Rd1] = Reg[R1] / Reg[R2], Reg[Rd2] = Reg[R1] % Reg[R2] (unsigned)
IF Reg[R1] == Reg[R2] THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[R1] != Reg[R2] THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[R1] < Reg[R2] THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[R1] <= Reg[R2] THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[Rc] == Cmp THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[Rc] != Cmp THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[Rc] < Cmp THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[Rc] <= Cmp THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[Rc] > Cmp THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[Rc] >= Cmp THEN PC += Imm
IF Reg[R1] < Reg[R2] THEN PC += Imm (unsigned)
IF Reg[R1] <= Reg[R2] THEN PC += Imm (unsigned)

IO[P] = (Reg[r_src] << imm_shift)
Set mask to ((1 << imm_width) - 1) << imm_shift

IO[P] = Reg[Rv]
Set mask to Reg[r_mask]

Reg[Rd] = Mem[Reg[Rs]] (8 bit load)
If I, Reg[Rs] += 1
If X, sign-extend Reg[Rd]

Reg[Rd] = Mem[Reg[Rs]] (16 bit load)
If I, Reg[Rs] += 2
If X, sign-extend Reg[Rd]

Reg[Rd] = Mem[Reg[Rs]] (32 bit load)
If I, Reg[Rs] += 4
If X, sign-extend Reg[Rd]

Mem[Reg[Rd]] = Reg[Rs] (8 bit store)
If I, Reg[Rd] += 1

Mem[Reg[Rd]] = Reg[Rs] (16 bit store)
If I, Reg[Rd] += 1

Mem[Reg[Rd]] = Reg[Rs] (32 bit store)
If I, Reg[Rd] += 1

Reg[Rd] = Mem[Reg[Rsrc] & 0x3FFFF + Reg[Roff]]
IF I THEN increment low 18 bits of Reg[Rsrc] by upper 14 bits
IF X THEN sign-extend Reg[Rd]
